description: Phase 0 freeze contract for safe closure of PR2/PR6/PR7/PR8.

monotonic_counts.name: evaluate_from_features_legacy
monotonic_counts.description: Legacy terminal verdict surface must not grow after Phase 0 freeze.

monotonic_counts.name: account_updates_enabled
monotonic_counts.description: Compatibility flag surface must not grow after Phase 0 freeze.

monotonic_counts.name: repaired_surface
monotonic_counts.description: Repair-centric operator language must not grow after Phase 0 freeze.

monotonic_counts.name: legacy_repair_surface
monotonic_counts.description: Legacy repair helpers must not grow after Phase 0 freeze.

monotonic_counts.name: repair_surface
monotonic_counts.description: Repair-prefixed surfaces must not grow after Phase 0 freeze.

zero_count_checks.name: production_on_transaction_path
zero_count_checks.description: Production hot path must not route decisions through gatekeeper_buffer.on_transaction().

presence_checks.name: metric_account_update_before_identity_total
presence_checks.description: Phase 0 must count account updates arriving before identity registration.

presence_checks.name: metric_account_update_build_none_total
presence_checks.description: Phase 0 must count build_account_state_update None exits.

presence_checks.name: metric_canonical_first_update_latency_ms
presence_checks.description: Phase 0 must measure NewPoolDetected to first canonical update latency.

presence_checks.name: metric_shadow_truth_fallback_total_oracle_runtime
presence_checks.description: Phase 0 must meter ShadowLedger fallback sites in oracle_runtime.

presence_checks.name: metric_post_buy_price_source_total
presence_checks.description: Phase 0 must expose post-buy price source telemetry.

presence_checks.name: metric_legacy_terminal_verdict_total
presence_checks.description: Phase 0 must meter legacy terminal verdict reachability.

presence_checks.name: metric_timeout_without_canonical_updates_total
presence_checks.description: Phase 0 must count timeout exits without canonical updates.

presence_checks.name: label_shadow_truth_fallback_site_resolve_price_context
presence_checks.description: Shadow truth fallback must expose resolve_price_context site label.

presence_checks.name: label_shadow_truth_fallback_site_resolve_gatekeeper_initial_reserves
presence_checks.description: Shadow truth fallback must expose resolve_gatekeeper_initial_reserves site label.

presence_checks.name: label_shadow_truth_fallback_site_tx_curve_enrichment_shadow
presence_checks.description: Shared shadow fallback metric must explicitly record tx_curve_enrichment_shadow usage.

presence_checks.name: label_post_buy_price_source_canonical_account_state
presence_checks.description: Post-buy price source metric must expose canonical_account_state source label.

presence_checks.name: label_post_buy_price_source_rpc_point_query
presence_checks.description: Post-buy price source metric must expose rpc_point_query source label.

presence_checks.name: label_post_buy_price_source_unavailable
presence_checks.description: Post-buy price source metric must expose unavailable source label.

block_absence_checks.name: resolve_price_context_no_shadow_ledger_get_curve
block_absence_checks.description: resolve_price_context must not fall back to shadow_ledger.get_curve().

block_absence_checks.name: resolve_gatekeeper_initial_reserves_no_shadow_ledger_get_curve
block_absence_checks.description: resolve_gatekeeper_initial_reserves must not fall back to shadow_ledger.get_curve().

block_absence_checks.name: revolver_price_feed_no_shadow_ledger_get_quote
block_absence_checks.description: Production revolver price feed must not use shadow_ledger.get_quote() as truth source.
